name: React
description: A JavaScript library for building user interfaces with a component-based architecture. React uses a virtual DOM to efficiently update and render UI components, making it one of the most popular frontend libraries in the world.
advantages: Component-based architecture promotes reusability and maintainability
Virtual DOM provides excellent performance for complex UIs
Large ecosystem with extensive third-party libraries and tools
Strong community support and Meta backing
React Native enables cross-platform mobile development
Excellent developer tools and debugging experience
disadvantages: Learning curve for JSX syntax and component lifecycle
Boilerplate code for state management in large applications
Fast-paced ecosystem can be overwhelming for beginners
Client-side rendering can impact SEO without additional tooling
